pkgmetadata.longdescription: FredPython wrapper of the St. Louis Federal Reserve Banks [FRED API webservice](httpapi.stlouisfed.orgdocsfred) for retrieving economic data.FRED API Documentation[httpapi.stlouisfed.orgdocsfred](httpapi.stlouisfed.orgdocsfred)Sign up for a FRED API key[httpapi.stlouisfed.orgapi_key.html](httpapi.stlouisfed.orgapi_key.html)
